3179530.name: In Violet Water
3179530.description:
An RPG in which you must navigate a world that has been reshaped over hundreds of years, and discover strange places, people, and things that somehow still seem vaguely familiar as you try to get back to the world you lost, if any of it is still left.

This place is dangerous, and you are not the strongest thing around, be clever, tactical, and resourceful to survive whatever things live here.

And don't worry, no matter how difficult things might get, there is always something that can help those in desperate need.
